name: Merit Medi Trans
districts_or_customers: Local non-emergency medical transport in Yuba/Sutter/Butte County area; referred via Passages Adult Resource Center and FREED Center for Independent Living; no school district contracts identified
recent_news: No M&A or notable news identified; appears to be a long-standing small local NEMT operator
fit_notes: Poor fit for Summit. This is a NEMT/medical transport micro-operator (~4 employees, ~$246K revenue), not a school-bus contractor; no school or SPED routes identified. Sub-scale even as a tuck-in.

name: Chicago Disability Transit LLC
principals: Michelle Dacy (owner per BBB); Karen Zaur (Manager)
districts_or_customers: Disability-owned paratransit serving Chicago metro general public 24/7; listed as a Medicaid/transportation-broker NPI; no identified school district or SPED routing contracts
recent_news: No M&A activity identified; long-tenured local operator with A+ BBB rating
fit_notes: Poor fit for Summit. Disability paratransit/NEMT, not yellow-bus or contracted SPED student transport. Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$227K) and outside Summit's school-route platform thesis.

name: Door To Door Transportation
service_types: possible school/special-needs transport per data flags
districts_or_customers: Chicago-area door-to-door service at 5001 S Racine Ave; no confirmed CPS or district contracts identified online; minimal web presence (no website, Yelp/Nextdoor listings only)
recent_news: No news, M&A or safety items identified
fit_notes: Possible micro tuck-in if it actually holds CPS SPED door-to-door routes (CPS heavily contracts SPED home-to-school), but ~$1M revenue and 15 employees indicates a single-garage operator. Diligence would need to confirm CPS contract status; otherwise minor opportunity.

name: Modern Transport
districts_or_customers: Melbourne, FL / Brevard County area; address shared with several local taxi/shuttle operators; no school district contracts identified; not the unrelated Pittsburgh-based Modern Transportation logistics firm at moderntrans.com
recent_news: No M&A or operating news identified
website: moderntrans.com (note: domain belongs to an unrelated PA-based logistics company; the Melbourne operator does not appear to control this URL)
fit_notes: Poor fit. Appears to be a 2-person legacy taxi/shuttle operation (claimed 1945 founding) rather than a yellow-bus or SPED contractor. Owner-operator with succession potential but well below Summit's tuck-in scale and outside core service line.

name: Traveling School Bus Intl Inc
fleet_size_est: unknown (39 employees suggests ~20-40 buses if a yellow-bus operator)
districts_or_customers: Listed at 22792 Centre Dr #250, Lake Forest, CA (Orange County executive-suite address shared with Carvin OC Inc and others, suggesting registered office only); no confirmed OC/LA district contracts found online; no working website identified
recent_news: No M&A, contract awards or news items identified; minimal digital footprint despite 39-employee headcount
fit_notes: Potentially interesting if it is in fact an active California school-bus operator (~$2M revenue, 39 employees, founded 2019), but the suite-250 address and absence of any website/contract footprint raises concern that this is a holding entity, charter/field-trip broker, or mislabeled record. Recommend pulling CHP school-bus certification and CA SOS filing before further work.
